props.name: active
props.description: Toggle the active state for the component.

props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: caret
props.description: Enables pseudo element caret on toggler.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: custom
props.description: Create a custom toggler which accepts any content.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: href
props.description: The href attribute specifies the URL of the page the link goes to.

props.name: navLink
props.description:
If a dropdown `variant` is set to `nav-item` then render the toggler as a
link instead of a button.

props.name: role
props.description: The role attribute describes the role of an element in programs that can make use of it, such as screen readers or magnifiers.

props.name: shape
props.description: Select the shape of the component.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

props.name: split
props.description:
Similarly, create split button dropdowns with virtually the same markup as
single button dropdowns, but with the addition of `.dropdown-toggle-split`
className for proper spacing around the dropdown caret.

props.name: splitLabel
props.description: Screen reader label for split button dropdown toggle.

props.name: toggle
props.description: Make the button behave as a toggle button. It manages its own active/pressed state, toggling it on click and reflecting it via the `aria-pressed` attribute.

props.name: trigger
props.description:
Sets which event handlers you'd like provided to your toggle prop. You can
specify one trigger or an array of them.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the button variant to an outlined button or a ghost button.
